subject: A masked humanoid rogue lurking in shadow, holding a curved dagger
description: A figure cloaked in deep shadow stands in profile, the lower half of their face concealed by a dark cloth mask. Sleek dark hair is pulled back and falls behind the shoulders. They grip a curved blade in a gloved hand, blade angled close to the body. The lighting is low-key chiaroscuro, with cool blue rim light tracing the silhouette and pale skin of the upper face while the rest of the figure dissolves into near-black. The setting reads as a nocturnal urban or stone alley — vague architectural shapes loom in the deep background. The mood is grim, stealthy, and predatory.
foreground: Masked rogue with curved dagger, dark hood/cowl and mask
background: Deep shadowed nocturnal setting with vague architectural silhouettes
emotion: cold focus, predatory stillness, eyes lowered
